info.title: SkyBox IO Programmable Interface
info.description: A simple FastAPI server for controlling and reading devices on a Raspberry Pi.

get.description:
Get temperature reading from an RTD sensor

Args:
    sensor_id: The ID of the RTD sensor to read

Returns:
    RTDResponse: Temperature reading and sensor information

Raises:
    HTTPException: If sensor not found or reading fails

List all available RTD sensors

Returns:
    List of available RTD sensor information

Return current read status for all RTD sensors, including temperature where available.
Helpful for debugging container access to I2C and sensor availability.
Read all virtual register values including demand response events
Read a specific virtual register value

post.description: Set a specific virtual register value
Set multiple virtual register values at once

get.description: Get current thermostat status including all registers and control state
Get all thermostat register values

post.description: Set multiple thermostat registers at once

get.description: Get a single thermostat register value

post.description: Set a single thermostat register value

get.description: List all connections with optional filtering

parameters.name: search

schema.description: Search in name, description, or tags
schema.title: Search

parameters.description: Search in name, description, or tags

get.description: Get connection statistics
Get metadata for connection forms (protocol options, data types, etc.)
Get a specific connection by ID

post.description: Scan network for BACnet devices using shared BAC0 controller.
Scan network for Modbus TCP devices using concurrent scanning.
Get all BACnet objects for a connection without saving to config.
Automatically discover BACnet objects and add them to configuration.
Scan Modbus registers for a connection to discover accessible register blocks.

get.description: List all points for a connection (Modbus or BACnet based on connection type)

post.description: Add a point to a connection (Modbus or BACnet based on connection type)

put.description: Update a point in a connection (Modbus or BACnet based on connection type)

delete.description: Delete a point from a Modbus connection

put.description:
Update cloud sync configuration for a specific point.
Controls whether this point's data is sent to the cloud.

For BACnet points, use the format 'objectType:instance' (e.g., 'analogValue:1').
For Modbus points, use the point name (e.g., 'BESS_STATE_OF_CHARGE').

parameters.name: point_name

schema.description: Point identifier - For Modbus: point name (e.g., 'BESS_SOC'). For BACnet: objectType:instance (e.g., 'analogValue:1')
schema.title: Point Name

parameters.description: Point identifier - For Modbus: point name (e.g., 'BESS_SOC'). For BACnet: objectType:instance (e.g., 'analogValue:1')

get.description: Check the status of the Raspberry Pi network interface.
Return current IPv4 configuration based on the device state.

put.description: Update IPv4 configuration and apply changes immediately.

manual.description: Uses a static IP address and DNS servers.

dhcp.description: Uses DHCP to obtain IP address and DNS servers automatically.

get.description:
List all available network interfaces with their status.

Returns information about ethernet and cellular interfaces,
including their availability, connection status, and routing metrics.

Safe to call even when cellular interface is not connected.

schema.title: Response List Interfaces Api Settings Network Interfaces Get

get.description:
Get current interface priority configuration.

Returns which interface is currently prioritized for routing.

schema.title: Response Get Interface Priority Api Settings Network Interfaces Priority Get

put.description:
Set routing priority for network interfaces.

Changes take effect immediately. The selected interface will be prioritized
for all outbound internet traffic.

Raises:
    400: If the requested interface is not available
    500: If configuration fails

ethernet.description: Use ethernet as primary interface, cellular as backup

cellular.description: Use cellular as primary interface, ethernet as backup

post.description:
Initiate a system reboot.
This endpoint triggers a graceful system reboot by:
1. Creating a reboot signal file for systemd to detect
2. Exiting the container gracefully
3. Allowing systemd to perform the actual system reboot
Returns HTTP 202 Accepted as the reboot will be processed asynchronously.

get.description: Get system/module information including MAC address and firmware version.
Get all current telemetry data points from cache.

post.description:
Execute a read-only SQL query and return results as JSON.

The query is executed using the shared telemetry storage connection.
Only SELECT statements are allowed (enforced by validation).

Returns:
    JSON with columns, rows (array of arrays), rowCount, and columnCount.

Get an APS access token for Tandem viewer.

Uses the standalone APS auth service which handles
token caching and automatic refresh.

get.description: Proxy requests to Tandem CDN for viewer assets.
Catch-all route to serve static files after all API routes are checked.
